session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report what happened.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci make target to check test and lint status

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 Downloading cpython-3.13.12-linux-x86_64-gnu (download) (33.4MiB) Downloaded cpython-3.13.12-linux-x86_64-gnu (download) Using CPython 3.13.12 Creating virtual environment at: .venv Building erk-dev @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev Building erk-mcp @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-mcp Built erk-mcp @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-mcp Built erk-dev @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev Installed 130 packages in 394ms [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.
CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 Violations: 0 make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
=== Fast CI ===
--- Lint --- All checks passed!
--- Format Check --- 1727 files already formatted
--- Prettier Check ---
... [118 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
**make fast-ci failed: Prettier found formatting issues in 2 files**
The command exited with status code 2. Here's the summary:
**Passing checks:** - Lint: All checks passed - Format check: 1727 files already formatted - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: OK - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit tests (erk): 6011 passed - Unit tests (erk-dev): 136 passed - Unit tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed - Unit tests (erk-mcp): 28 passed
**Failing check:** - Prettier: Code style issues found in 2 files - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
The issue is that these two Markdown files need formatting with Prettier. The make target failed due to the `--check` flag detecting formatting violations.
